content: Salesperson selection is required in invoice create and edit flows.

name: Incremental json_serializable migration
description: Migrate small core models first (StaffMember, Customer, AdjustmentReason) while preserving fromMap/toMap signatures to avoid repository-layer churn.

name: Reports overview layout
description: Replaced commissions-only report route with a branch-aware reports overview that combines KPI summary, revenue trend, payment mix, invoice lifecycle mix, top products, and commission leaderboard in one screen.

name: Generated model parsing wrappers
description: schema_models.dart and sales_models.dart now use json_serializable wrappers for fromMap/toMap, preserving custom enum/date/bool conversions and non-persisted field exclusions.

name: Inventory adjustment right-panel overflow guard
description: Use a Flexible + SingleChildScrollView wrapper for dense settings blocks above fixed footer actions to avoid RenderFlex overflow on short viewports.

name: CSV category inference for import prep
description: CSV pre-clean now infers missing categories from product-name keywords and learned code-prefix mappings, reducing Uncategorized values to zero while preserving required import headers.
